source: NHA hospital cost survey 2023-24: ALOS 3-5 days for NABH-accredited hospitals. Apollo FY25 reported ALOS ~4.2 days. Narayana: ~3.5 days (efficient clinical pathways).
NABH standards: target occupancy 60-75% for balanced throughput vs. quality. Apollo FY25: ~70%, Narayana: ~68%, Fortis: ~62%.
Narayana FY25: 28%, Apollo FY25: 30%, Fortis FY25: 31%. NHA survey: 25-35% range.
Apollo FY25: 28%, Fortis FY25: 25%, Narayana FY25: 27%. NHA: 22-28% range for tertiary care. Implant-heavy centres higher.
Apollo FY25 EBITDA margin: ~20% (healthcare vertical). Narayana FY25: ~18%. Fortis FY25: ~14%. New entrant multispecialty: 5-10%.

kpi_name: Revenue per Occupied Bed per Day (₹)
source: Apollo FY25: ~₹28,000/bed/day (tertiary, metro). Narayana: ~₹15,000 (value model). NHA PM-JAY rates: ₹5,000-₹15,000 for empanelled procedures.
